title: Add lifecycle crash diagnostics
summary: Add focused diagnostic logging around app lifecycle, coordinator task flow, and MQTT/session transitions to help identify silent exits or crashes when reproduction conditions are unknown.
semantic_summary: Verified a diagnostic-only change that increases observability around startup, shutdown, task cancellation, and unexpected termination paths without altering functional behavior.

inputs.request: connect failedで、アプリが終了してしまう可能性は？ いつの間にか終了してしまってます。 リプロ条件が分からないので、終了・クラッシュしそうな箇所にログを追加して。
evidence: MQTT disconnect log observed before unexpected app termination
Current code explicitly terminates only on Quit action
Need broader logging for lifecycle and crash-adjacent paths

code_changes: Lifecycle entry/exit logs in app delegate
Coordinator task creation/cancellation and state transition logs
verification: No intentional behavior change beyond diagnostics

acceptance_criteria: Unexpected app termination can be investigated with richer breadcrumbs in the app log
Logging covers startup, stop, termination callbacks, task cancellation, and MQTT disconnect/reconnect flow
notes: Avoid speculative behavior changes until root cause is identified
If true crash handlers are not safe/available, log nearest observable lifecycle boundaries instead
